ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Inventory And Appraisal.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Continued To Feb-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta McNeill for the Co-Executors.

Ms. McNeill stated that partial inventory number 6 which was for the personal property was filed, that partial inventory 1 through 5 which was for the real property had not been filed as the Executors were trying to sell the properties and felt that having an inventory might effect the bargaining power of the sale price. In addition, she stated that she filed consents from all the Beneficiaries to delay the final inventory and that the Co-Executors were asking for 6 months to continue to try to sell the real property. Ms. McNeill informed the Court that she had the consent for appointment of the Guardian Ad Litem, but that she was waiting for one more signature. The matter was continued to February 4, 2009.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Neu.

Petition For Order Directing Outright Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Continued To Feb-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta McNeill for the Co-Executors.

Ms. McNeill stated that the consent forms from the Adults and the Minors (signed by the Parents) were filed and that she submitted a declaration this morning. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.
